languages.text: {n}Вы не можете скосить взгляд на Себериана — глазные мышцы застыли, как и все остальное тело. Судьба предка остается для вас загадкой.{/n}
{n}You cannot look sideways at Seberian — your eye muscles are frozen, as is the rest of your body. The fate of your ancestor remains a mystery to you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы не можете скосить взгляд на Себериана — глазные мышцы застыли, как и все остальное тело. Судьба предка остается для вас загадкой.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You cannot look sideways at Seberian — your eye muscles are frozen, as is the rest of your body. The fate of your ancestor remains a mystery to you.{/n}
{n}You cannot look sideways at Seberian — your eye muscles are frozen, as is the rest of your body. The fate of your ancestor remains a mystery to you.{/n}
{n}You cannot look sideways at Seberian — your eye muscles are frozen, as is the rest of your body. The fate of your ancestor remains a mystery to you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}シベリアンの景色を横目に見ることはできない。眼筋は凍り付いているし、体も凍り付いている。祖先の運命は謎のまま。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You cannot look sideways at Seberian — your eye muscles are frozen, as is the rest of your body. The fate of your ancestor remains a mystery to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: シベリアの景色を横目に見ることはできない。眼筋は凍り付いているし、体も凍り付いている。祖先の運命は謎のまま。

languages.text: {n}你无法侧目看向塞贝里安——你眼部的肌肉被冻结了，一如身体其他部分。你先祖的命运对你而言依然成谜。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You cannot look sideways at Seberian — your eye muscles are frozen, as is the rest of your body. The fate of your ancestor remains a mystery to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你无法侧目看向塞贝里安——你眼部的肌肉被冻结了，一如身体其他部分。你先祖的命运对你而言依然成谜。{/n}

languages.text: {n}No puedes mirar de soslayo a Seberian: los músculos de tus ojos están congelados, al igual que el resto de tu cuerpo. El destino de tu antepasado es un misterio.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You cannot look sideways at Seberian — your eye muscles are frozen, as is the rest of your body. The fate of your ancestor remains a mystery to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}No puedes mirar de soslayo a Seberian: los músculos de tus ojos están congelados, al igual que el resto de tu cuerpo. El destino de tu antepasado es un misterio.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du kannst Seberian keinen Blick zuwerfen — die Muskeln deiner Augen sind ebenso gelähmt wie der gesamte Rest deines Körpers. Das Schicksal deines Ahnherren bleibt dir verborgen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You cannot look sideways at Seberian — your eye muscles are frozen, as is the rest of your body. The fate of your ancestor remains a mystery to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du kannst Seberian keinen Blick zuwerfen — die Muskeln deiner Augen sind ebenso gelähmt wie der gesamte Rest deines Körpers. Das Schicksal deines Ahnherren bleibt dir verborgen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les muscles de vos yeux étant figés comme le reste de votre corps, il vous est impossible de regarder Seberian qui se tient sur le côté. Le sort de votre ancêtre reste un mystère.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You cannot look sideways at Seberian — your eye muscles are frozen, as is the rest of your body. The fate of your ancestor remains a mystery to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les muscles de vos yeux étant figés comme le reste de votre corps, il vous est impossible de regarder Seberian qui se tient sur le côté. Le sort de votre ancêtre reste un mystère.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian'a yan gözle bakamıyorsun. Tıpkı bedeninin geri kalanı gibi göz kasların da donmuş. Atanın kaderi, senin için bir sır olarak kalmaya devam ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You cannot look sideways at Seberian — your eye muscles are frozen, as is the rest of your body. The fate of your ancestor remains a mystery to you.{/n}
